creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Anonymous <swell.k@gmail.com> writes:

>> +	${MKDIR} ${FCDIR} ${PREFIX}/${FCDIR_LINKS}
>
> You don't have to create FCDIR. It should be done by fontconfig port[2].

BTW, your patch is missing @dirrmtry for fonts/conf.{avail,d} in plist
after creating them in do-install. If you're gonna support fontconfig
installed under different PREFIX then clean up all extra dirs that are
not in MTREE_FILE.
